Mission.title: Mission
Mission.description: An execution mission (timeline planner/sprint tracking) created by the user.

userId.description: Identifier of the pilot/user who owns this mission

goal.description: The main objective of the mission

createdAt.description: Date when the mission was created

confidenceScore.description: Calculated score indicating prediction success chance

shadowTimeline.description: Shadow planning buffer times (best, expected, worst case hours)

tasks.description: Sprint tasks representing individual items to be resolved

failurePrediction.description: Live AI feedback identifying predicted bottlenecks

decisionLog.description: Audit trail log of choices and updates

notifications.description: Smart notifications related to this mission

/missions/{missionId}.description: Active sprint and task records mapped to distinct mission IDs
